R e a d in g R o b in s o n ’s a r tic le w a s lik e h a v in g a v e il lifte d . H e e x p la in s h o w th e p a n d e m ic d id n ’t ju s t e x p o s e in e q u a lity, it a c c e le r a te d it. A s m illio n s o f p e o p le lo s t jo b s a n d s tr u g g le d to s u r v iv e , g lo b a l e lite s u s e d th e c h a o s to g r o w th e ir w e a lth a n d tig h te n th e ir g r ip o n p o w e r (R o b in s o n , 2 0 2 0 ). It w a s s h o c k in g to r e a d a b o u t h o w th is “ w a r e c o n o m y ” d e p e n d s o n m ilita r iz a tio n , s u r v e illa n c e , a n d v io le n c e to k e e p its e lf g o in g . I c o u ld n ’t h e lp b u t th in k a b o u t h o w th is h a s p la y e d o u t in r e a l life . D u r in g th e p a n d e m ic , w h ile fr o n tlin e w o r k e r s w e r e h a ile d a s h e r o e s , m a n y w e r e le ft w ith lo w p a y a n d n o s a fe ty n e t. A t th e s a m e tim e , b illio n a ir e s a d d e d tr illio n s to th e ir w e a lth . It’s in fu r ia tin g to r e a liz e th a t th e s e o u tc o m e s w e r e n ’t ju s t b a d lu c k o r p o o r p la n n in g , th e y w e r e th e s y s te m w o r k in g e x a c tly a s it w a s d e s ig n e d to . T h e d o c u m e n ta r y O c c u p a tio n 1 0 1 b r o u g h t th e s e id e a s to life in a w a y th a t w a s d e e p ly p e r s o n a l a n d h e a r tb r e a k in g . It fo c u s e s o n th e liv e s o f P a le s tin ia n s u n d e r Is r a e li o c c u p a tio n , s h o w in g th e d a ily in d ig n itie s a n d s y s te m ic v io le n c e th e y e n d u r e . T h e d o c u m e n ta r y m a k e s it c le a r th a t th e o c c u p a tio n is n ’t ju s t a b o u t tw o g r o u p s in c o n flic t; it’s a d e lib e r a te s y s te m o f o p p r e s s io n b a c k e d b y g lo b a l p o w e r s . T h e U .S .’s fin a n c ia l a n d m ilita r y s u p p o r t fo r Is r a e l p la y s a h u g e r o le in m a in ta in in g th is s y s te m . S e e in g h o w in te r tw in e d g lo b a l p o litic s a r e w ith th e s u ffe r in g o f r e a l p e o p le w a s a s o b e r in g r e m in d e r o f h o w p o w e r o p e r a te s o n a n in te r n a tio n a l s c a le . W h a t a ls o s to o d o u t to m e w a s th e w a y te c h n o lo g y p la y s in to th is o p p r e s s io n . A d v a n c e d m ilita r y e q u ip m e n t a n d s u r v e illa n c e to o ls a r e u s e d to c o n tr o l P a le s tin ia n s , a n d th e o c c u p ie d te r r ito r ie s a r e o fte n tr e a te d a s a te s tin g g r o u n d fo r th e s e te c h n o lo g ie s . T h is r e m in d e d m e o f R o b in s o n ’s p o in t a b o u t h o w to o ls d e v e lo p e d fo r w a r a r e in c r e a s in g ly u s e d to m o n ito r a n d s u p p r e s s c iv ilia n p o p u la tio n s . It’s c h illin g to th in k a b o u t h o w th e s e s y s te m s e v o lv e a n d s p r e a d , a ffe c tin g p e o p le fa r b e y o n d th e ir o r ig in a l c o n te x t. B o th R o b in s o n ’s a r tic le a n d O c c u p a tio n 1 0 1 e m p h a s iz e h o w g lo b a l c a p ita lis m a n d m ilita r is m in te r s e c t to e x p lo it p e o p le . To g e th e r, th e y m a d e m e r e a liz e h o w c o n n e c te d th e s e s y s te m s a r e . T h e v io le n c e a n d o p p r e s s io n w e s e e in o n e p a r t o f th e w o r ld o fte n fe e d in to la r g e r, g lo b a l p a tte r n s . F o r e x a m p le , R o b in s o n m e n tio n s h o w c r is e s lik e th e p a n d e m ic b e c o m e o p p o r tu n itie s fo r e lite s to tig h te n th e ir g r ip o n p o w e r (R o b in s o n , 2 0 2 0 ). In O c c u p a tio n 1 0 1 , w e s e e h o w th e Is r a e li g o v e r n m e n t u s e s s im ila r ta c tic s to ju s tify its a c tio n s , fr a m in g o p p r e s s io n a s n e c e s s a r y fo r “ s e c u r ity.” B o th w o r k s h ig h lig h t h o w th e s e n a r r a tiv e s a r e u s e d to p r o te c t s y s te m s o f p o w e r w h ile d e h u m a n iz in g th e p e o p le w h o s u ffe r u n d e r th e m . E n g a g in g w ith th e s e w o r k s w a s b o th e y e - o p e n in g a n d u n s e ttlin g . T h e y fo r c e d m e to c o n fr o n t th e fa c t th a t I’m n o t s e p a r a te fr o m th e s e s y s te m s . L iv in g in a c o u n tr y th a t b e n e fits fr o m g lo b a l c a p ita lis m a n d m ilita r is m m e a n s I’m c o m p lic it in w a y s I h a d n ’t fu lly c o n s id e r e d . W h e th e r it’s th r o u g h th e ta x e s I p a y, th e p r o d u c ts I b u y, o r e v e n th e m e d ia n a r r a tiv e s I’v e a c c e p te d , I’v e p la y e d a p a r t in s u s ta in in g th e s e in ju s tic e s . A t th e s a m e tim e , th e s e w o r k s r e m in d e d m e th a t r e s is ta n c e is p o s s ib le . R o b in s o n e n d s h is a r tic le w ith a c a ll to a c tio n , e m p h a s iz in g th e im p o r ta n c e o f g lo b a l m o v e m e n ts to c h a lle n g e th e s e s y s te m s . S im ila r ly, O c c u p a tio n 1 0 1 h ig h lig h ts th e r e s ilie n c e o f P a le s tin ia n s w h o c o n tin u e to fig h t fo r th e ir r ig h ts d e s p ite o v e r w h e lm in g o d d s . T h e ir c o u r a g e is a p o w e r fu l r e m in d e r th a t c h a n g e , w h ile d iffic u lt, is a lw a y s w o r th s tr iv in g fo r. T h e s e w o r k s le ft m e w ith a d e e p e r u n d e r s ta n d in g o f h o w in te r c o n n e c te d th e w o r ld ’s in ju s tic e s a r e — a n d h o w n e c e s s a r y it is to a d d r e s s th e m . C h a lle n g in g th e g lo b a l w a r e c o n o m y m e a n s ta c k lin g in e q u a lity, d is m a n tlin g s y s te m s o f v io le n c e , a n d a m p lify in g th e v o ic e s o f th o s e w h o a r e m o s t a ffe c te d . F o r m e , th is m e a n s s ta y in g in fo r m e d , q u e s tio n in g th e s y s te m s I p a r tic ip a te in , a n d fin d in g w a y s to s u p p o r t m o v e m e n ts fo r ju s tic e . W h e th e r it’s th r o u g h e d u c a tio n , a d v o c a c y, o r d ir e c t a c tio n , th e r e a r e w a y s to r e s is t. B o th R o b in s o n ’s a r tic le a n d O c c u p a tio n 1 0 1 s h o w e d m e th a t w h ile th e s y s te m s s h a p in g o u r w o r ld a r e p o w e r fu l, s o is th e h u m a n c a p a c ity fo r r e s ilie n c e a n d c h a n g e .
